examTitle: Hobbies & Leisure B1 Mock Reading Exam

parts.title: Part 1: Multiple-Choice Reading Comprehension
parts.instructions: Read the text and answer the questions. For each question, choose the correct answer A, B, C or D.

questions.question: What does the writer suggest about the festival in the first paragraph?
options: A. It is a traditional event.
B. It is a modern festival.
C. It is a popular festival.
D. It is a boring festival.
questions.explanation: The writer suggests that the festival is a popular event by mentioning that it has been running for 50 years and attracts many visitors. Options B and D are incorrect because the writer does not mention that it is a modern festival or a boring festival.

questions.question: What does the writer say about the food at the festival?
options: A. It is very expensive.
B. It is very delicious.
C. It is very spicy.
D. It is very boring.
questions.explanation: The writer does not mention anything about the food at the festival. Option B is incorrect because the writer does not say that the food is delicious. Option C is incorrect because the writer does not mention that the food is spicy.

questions.question: What does the writer say about the music at the festival?
options: A. It is very loud.
B. It is very quiet.
C. It is very modern.
D. It is very traditional.
questions.explanation: The writer does not mention anything about the music at the festival. Option A is incorrect because the writer does not say that the music is loud. Option C is incorrect because the writer does not mention that the music is modern.

questions.question: What does the writer say about the festival in the second paragraph?
options: A. It is a fun event.
B. It is a sad event.
C. It is a happy event.
D. It is a boring event.
questions.explanation: The writer says that the festival is a fun event by mentioning that it has a range of activities and attractions.

questions.question: What does the writer say about the festival in the final paragraph?
options: A. It is a popular event.
B. It is a modern festival.
C. It is a traditional event.
D. It is a boring festival.
questions.explanation: The writer does not mention anything about the festival in the final paragraph.

parts.content: The festival has been running for 50 years and attracts many visitors. It has a range of activities and attractions, including live music, food stalls, and games. The festival is a fun event that people of all ages can enjoy. The festival is held in a large park and features a range of music, from traditional to modern. The festival is a popular event that people come from all over to attend.

parts.title: Part 2: Matching Profiles to Texts
parts.instructions: Read the descriptions of the 5 people and the 8 texts. Decide which text would be the most suitable for each person.

questions.question: Which text would be most suitable for Sarah?
options: A
B
C
D
questions.content: Sarah is a 25-year-old marketing executive who loves trying new foods and drinks. She is always on the go and has a busy schedule. She loves taking photos of her food and sharing them on social media. She is from a big city and has never lived in a small town.
questions.explanation: The most suitable text for Sarah would be B, as it describes someone who enjoys trying new foods and drinks and is always on the go.

questions.question: Which text would be most suitable for John?
options: A
B
C
D
questions.content: John is a 30-year-old graphic designer who loves playing music and painting. He is a bit of a homebody and prefers to stay at home. He loves listening to classical music and is a fan of the Beatles. He has been to many festivals and concerts in his life.
questions.explanation: The most suitable text for John would be C, as it describes someone who enjoys playing music and painting, and is a bit of a homebody.

questions.question: Which text would be most suitable for Emily?
options: A
B
C
D
questions.content: Emily is a 20-year-old student who loves reading and writing. She is a bit shy and prefers to stay at home. She loves playing video games and watching movies. She has never been to a music festival.
questions.explanation: The most suitable text for Emily would be A, as it describes someone who enjoys reading and writing, and is a bit shy.

questions.question: Which text would be most suitable for Michael?
options: A
B
C
D
questions.content: Michael is a 28-year-old software engineer who loves playing sports and hiking. He is very active and enjoys spending time outdoors. He loves playing football and basketball, and is a fan of the Manchester United football team. He has been to many music festivals in his life.
questions.explanation: The most suitable text for Michael would be D, as it describes someone who enjoys playing sports and hiking, and is very active.

questions.question: Which text would be most suitable for Rachel?
options: A
B
C
D
questions.content: Rachel is a 22-year-old artist who loves painting and drawing. She is very creative and enjoys expressing herself through art. She loves listening to indie music and is a fan of the Arctic Monkeys. She has never been to a music festival.
questions.explanation: The most suitable text for Rachel would be B, as it describes someone who enjoys painting and drawing, and is very creative.

content.text: This person is a 25-year-old marketing executive who loves trying new foods and drinks. They are always on the go and have a busy schedule. They love taking photos of their food and sharing them on social media. They are from a big city and have never lived in a small town.
content.label: A

content.label: B

They love playing football and basketball, and are a fan of the Manchester United football team. They have been to many music festivals in their life.
content.label: D

parts.title: Part 3: Multiple-Choice for Short Texts
parts.instructions: Read the texts. For each question, choose the correct answer A, B or C.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of the advertisement?
options: A. To promote a new product.
B. To persuade customers to buy a product.
C. To inform customers about a sale.
D. To educate customers about a topic.
questions.content: Are you tired of using the same old toothbrush? Introducing the new and improved toothbrush with soft bristles and a comfortable handle. Get it now and start brushing your teeth with confidence!
questions.explanation: The main purpose of the advertisement is to persuade customers to buy the product. Option A is incorrect because the advertisement is not promoting a new product. Option C is incorrect because the advertisement is not informing customers about a sale.

questions.question: What is the main idea of the notice?
options: A. To inform customers about a new policy.
B. To warn customers about a problem.
C. To remind customers about an event.
D. To persuade customers to take action.
questions.content: Attention all customers! Please be aware of the new parking restrictions in the area. From now on, parking will only be allowed in designated areas.
questions.explanation: The main idea of the notice is to warn customers about a problem. Option A is incorrect because the notice is not informing customers about a new policy. Option C is incorrect because the notice is not reminding customers about an event.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of the message?
options: A. To invite friends to a party.
B. To inform friends about a change.
C. To persuade friends to take action.
D. To educate friends about a topic.
questions.content: Hey guys! I've decided to change my phone number. From now on, please contact me at 01234 567890.
questions.explanation: The main purpose of the message is to inform friends about a change. Option A is incorrect because the message is not inviting friends to a party. Option C is incorrect because the message is not persuading friends to take action.

questions.question: What is the main idea of the text?
options: A. To persuade readers to buy a product.
B. To inform readers about a topic.
C. To entertain readers with a story.
D. To educate readers about a topic.
questions.content: The new coffee shop in town is a must-visit destination for coffee lovers. With its wide selection of coffee beans and expert baristas, you'll be spoiled for choice.
questions.explanation: The main idea of the text is to inform readers about a topic. Option A is incorrect because the text is not persuading readers to buy a product. Option C is incorrect because the text is not entertaining readers with a story.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of the text?
options: A. To persuade readers to take action.
B. To inform readers about a topic.
C. To entertain readers with a story.
D. To educate readers about a topic.
questions.content: The new park in town is a great place to spend a sunny afternoon. With its beautiful gardens and playgrounds, you'll find something for everyone.
questions.explanation: The main purpose of the text is to inform readers about a topic. Option A is incorrect because the text is not persuading readers to take action. Option C is incorrect because the text is not entertaining readers with a story.

content.text: Are you tired of using the same old toothbrush? Introducing the new and improved toothbrush with soft bristles and a comfortable handle. Get it now and start brushing your teeth with confidence!
content.label: A

content.text: Attention all customers! Please be aware of the new parking restrictions in the area. From now on, parking will only be allowed in designated areas.
content.label: B

content.text: Hey guys! I've decided to change my phone number. From now on, please contact me at 01234 567890.
content.label: C

content.text: The new coffee shop in town is a must-visit destination for coffee lovers. With its wide selection of coffee beans and expert baristas, you'll be spoiled for choice.
content.label: D

content.text: The new park in town is a great place to spend a sunny afternoon. With its beautiful gardens and playgrounds, you'll find something for everyone.
content.label: E
